headline: A Look At TE Connectivity (TEL) Valuation After Strong Q2 Results And Upbeat Earnings Guidance
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) stock is in focus after the company reported second quarter results and issued fresh guidance that points to higher expected sales and earnings for the upcoming quarter. See our latest analysis for TE Connectivity. The stock has eased in recent months, with a year to date share price return of an 11.27% decline, but a 1 year total shareholder return of 41.33% and a 3 year total shareholder return of 79.47% point to momentum that has rewarded longer term holders.
